privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: The AI Interview platform (\"System\") is committed to protecting your personal data. This policy explains how we collect, use, and disclose your information when using our automated interview service.
privacy.section2Content: We may collect the following information:
privacy.dataIdentity: Personal Information: Full name, email, work history (Resume/CV)
privacy.dataMedia: Audio/Video Data: Interview recordings, voice data
privacy.dataTech: Technical Data: IP address, device type, usage history
privacy.purpose1: Processing and analyzing interview results using AI
privacy.purpose2: Sending evaluation reports to the company's HR department
privacy.purpose3: Improving AI system performance (data will be anonymized)
privacy.section4Content: Video data and evaluation results will be stored for 1 year or as determined by the hiring company. After that, the system will automatically delete the data. If you wish to delete your data earlier, please contact the HR department of the company you applied to.
privacy.section5Content: By using this system, you consent to our recording of your video and audio throughout the interview and to using AI for initial analysis.
